name: AI Social Media Automation - Shankar Group

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, request_id: $json['Request ID'] || $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.request_id, status: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.overall_status, topic: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.topic, image_url: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.image_url, instagram: { status: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.instagram_status, post_id: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.instagram_post_id }, twitter: { status: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.twitter_status, post_id: $('Merge & Prepare Log').first().json.twitter_post_id }, message: 'Workflow executed successfully' }, null, 2) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, request_id: $json.request_id, error: $json.error_message, failed_node: $json.failed_node, message: 'Workflow execution failed' }, null, 2) }}
